test.name: Saucedemo Locked Out Login

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/home/many/workspace/rfmcp-reloaded/tests/saucedemo/results/browser/traces/temp/f04d1728-eed5-46a7-a869-4600660a6380"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: Set Browser Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout used by most input and getter keywords.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: about:blank

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'locked_out_user' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'secret_sauce' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: TimeoutError: locator.click: Timeout 60000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('id=login-button') - locator resolved to <input type="submit" value="Login" id="login-button" name="login-button" data-test="login-button" class="submit-button btn_action"/> - attempting click action - waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is visible, enabled and stable - scrolling into view if needed - done scrolling - performing click action
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
kw.status: TimeoutError: locator.click: Timeout 60000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('id=login-button') - locator resolved to <input type="submit" value="Login" id="login-button" name="login-button" data-test="login-button" class="submit-button btn_action"/> - attempting click action - waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is visible, enabled and stable - scrolling into view if needed - done scrolling - performing click action

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

test.status: TimeoutError: locator.click: Timeout 60000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('id=login-button') - locator resolved to <input type="submit" value="Login" id="login-button" name="login-button" data-test="login-button" class="submit-button btn_action"/> - attempting click action - waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is visible, enabled and stable - scrolling into view if needed - done scrolling - performing click action
